hook: 5 LESSONS FROM BUILDING AN AI CONTENT PIPELINE THAT CUT MANUAL WORK 80%.

slides.headline: STOP WRITING PROMPTS. BUILD SYSTEMS.
slides.body: One prompt is a coin flip. A pipeline is a machine — same brief in, on-brand asset out, every time.

slides.headline: THE BRAND JSON IS THE SOURCE OF TRUTH.
slides.body: Fonts, palette, voice, positioning — encode them once. Then every model decision is constrained, not guessed.

caption:
I spent a month wiring an end-to-end AI content pipeline for the studio. Here are the 5 lessons that actually moved the needle — concrete numbers, zero corporate filler. Save this if you're building in public.

Which one hits hardest? Drop a comment.
